channel.title: Leadership on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Leadership on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Junior Developer Pipeline Problem: Where Do Tomorrow's Seniors Come From?
item.description: Most of the AI-and-developers conversation assumes a steady supply of senior engineers who can curate, review, and judge. But the work that used to produce those seniors is the work AI now does. Where does the next generation come from?

item.title: The Meaning of Work in an Age of Abundance: Finding Purpose When Agents Do the Heavy Lifting
item.description: If agents end up doing the execution, what are we for? Some thinking out loud about purpose, identity, and what a working life might look like when the labour layer is automated.

item.title: Agent-First Architecture: The Engineer as System Curator
item.description: Some thoughts on where agent-first architecture might take us, and what engineering could look like if the job shifts from building systems line by line to curating, governing, and evolving fleets of agents.
